response.original_title: On the Tip of the Tongue
response.overview: Luana is excited to attend her best friend's party, but her plans are upended when she's forced to spend the day with her grandmother, who's just arrived from Brazil. To make matters worse, they don't speak the same language - Luana doesn't speak Portuguese, and her grandmother doesn't speak English. Frustration turns into connection as they begin to bond through cooking, and Luana slowly starts to embrace her Brazilian roots.
response.title: On the Tip of the Tongue
